creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
The symptom I see is that when PULSEAUDIO=off, qTox fails to play audio. See bug#214393 I also, like this user, observe the problem.

With PULSEAUDIO=off (which is a default), it shows devices in this format "pcm2:play:dsp2", but they don't work.

With PULSEAUDIO=on, it shows devices in the format /dev/dspN, and they work.


Please fix PULSEAUDIO=off.

Thanks!
